So doing the math on this:
Chaos - 15 characters.
Aequor - 9
Caro - 10
Ultra - 9

For the first 4 days you can enter three times in Chaos, twice the other two days if you have everyone.

Then for the two days where anyone can enter, you can enter 10 times if you have everyone, or a maximum of 3 missing characters.

Then, for pairs:
Chaos - Any can enter 6 times, with Chaos-Caro permitting you to be missing one character.
Other pairs can enter 4 times, and permit you to be missing 2 or 3 characters.
The tl;dr of this is to get max rewards you need every character except one Caro.
You can also be missing a Chaos and still get max as well.
